summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BETRADARMUS after OddsPapi Signal Engine 2.0, SofaScore Live Feed, Match Details Modal, and Live Ticker integration. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All components rendering correctly, auth flow working, live data displaying.

minor.issue: Returns empty array when no live matches with odds data available - this is expected behavior

issues: Chart component warnings about width/height being -1 - non-blocking, previously reported

critical_code_review_comments: OddsPapi Signal Engine 2.0 integration working correctly - returns signals with signal_score, recommendation, suggested_bet
SofaScore Live Feed working - returns live_matches array with team names, scores, league info
Match Details Modal working - shows PRO/ELITE feature lock for free users, full stats for premium users
Live Ticker displaying real signals from Signal Engine API
Auth flow working correctly - login/register with JWT tokens
Premium access control working - free users see limited preview, premium users get full details
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_signal_engine@betradarmus.de during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signal Engine 2.0 and SofaScore integration fully tested. All endpoints working: /api/sofascore/live (returns live matches), /api/signals/upcoming (returns upcoming signals with scores), /api/signals/live (returns live signals when available), /api/signals/tournaments (returns 118 tournaments), /api/sofascore/match/{id} (returns match details with stats for premium users). Frontend components: LiveTicker shows real signals, LiveMatchesFeed shows 6 live matches, SignalEnginePanel shows upcoming signals with tabs, MatchDetailsModal opens on match card click with PRO/ELITE lock for free users. Auth flow working with admin@betradarmus.de / Betradarmus2024!
features_tested: Backend Health Check: GET /api/ returns status ok
Auth Flow: POST /api/auth/register creates new user with JWT token
Auth Flow: POST /api/auth/login authenticates admin user with ELITE subscription
SofaScore Live Matches: GET /api/sofascore/live returns 6 live matches
Signal Engine Upcoming: GET /api/signals/upcoming returns 28 signals (3 preview for free users)
Signal Engine Live: GET /api/signals/live returns signals when live matches available
Signal Engine Tournaments: GET /api/signals/tournaments returns 118 tournaments
Match Details: GET /api/sofascore/match/{id} returns full stats for premium users
Billing Info: GET /api/billing/info returns subscription data for authenticated users
Frontend Landing Page: Renders correctly with all new components
Frontend Auth Modal: Opens on CTA click, login flow works
Frontend Live Ticker: Displays signals and animates
Frontend Signal Engine Panel: Renders with signal cards, tabs, legend
Frontend Live Matches Feed: Shows 6 live matches with match cards
Frontend Match Details Modal: Opens on match card click, shows PRO/ELITE lock

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - OddsPapi uses real API key, SofaScore uses RapidAPI key
